goal: Audit upper-computer ROS2 code and lower-computer STM32/ESP01S code.
deliverable: Static audit findings with file and line references plus remote validation commands.
constraints: Do not build or run locally in /mnt/ros2_ws.
Do not inspect live ROS topics, nodes, TF, or hardware locally.
Do not modify functional code in this audit pass.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-layer protocol and unit contract reviewed.
